dr-sarah-johnson.title: MD
dr-sarah-johnson.bio: Dr. Johnson is a board-certified internist with 15+ years of experience in primary care and chronic disease management.

dr-michael-chen.title: MD
dr-michael-chen.bio: Dr. Chen specializes in preventive cardiology and is an expert in managing hypertension and heart disease.
